name: example-huashu-pentagram-grid
title: Pentagram Info-Architecture
description: Rational Swiss-grid data decks: black-and-white restraint, Helvetica Neue hierarchy, one red (#E63946), 64px black chrome bars, 5%-opacity grid hairlines, and 260px giant numerals anchoring red/dark/grey comparison bar charts on a fixed 1920×1080 canvas. Based on https://github.com/alchaincyf/huashu-design ppt-pentagram, expanded from a single showcase page into a full multi-section deck.

description_i18n.en: Rational Swiss-grid data decks: black-and-white restraint, Helvetica Neue hierarchy, one red (#E63946), 64px black chrome bars, 5%-opacity grid hairlines, and 260px giant numerals anchoring red/dark/grey comparison bar charts on a fixed 1920×1080 canvas. Based on https://github.com/alchaincyf/huashu-design ppt-pentagram, expanded from a single showcase page into a full multi-section deck.
description_i18n.zh-CN: 理性信息建筑派数据幻灯片：黑白克制的瑞士网格、Helvetica Neue 强层级、唯一红色 #E63946、上下 64px 黑色信息条、5% 透明度网格细线、260px 巨型数字锚点压红/黑/灰对比条形图，1920×1080 固定画布、零外部依赖。基于花叔 huashu-design 的 ppt-pentagram 单页范本扩展为完整多章节 deck。

query.en: Create a Swiss-grid {{deckType}} for {{audience}} about {{topic}} with {{slideCount}}, using the Pentagram Info-Architecture system (based on huashu-design ppt-pentagram): a fixed 1920×1080 canvas auto-scaled to the viewport; white pages framed by 64px solid-black chrome bars top and bottom (uppercase tracked labels, red `/` separator, red right-hand label, 900-weight logotype + footnote in the bottom bar); absolutely-positioned 1px grid hairlines at 5% opacity on 80px outer gutters; the single font stack 'Helvetica Neue'/PingFang SC with zero external dependencies; exactly one accent #E63946 used for ≤4 touches per page (red decimal/slash inside giant numerals, red winning bars, red kicker numbers, red punctuation in headlines). Every hero page is anchored by one 180–260px weight-900 negative-tracked numeral; comparisons use the locked red/dark/grey horizontal bar system (right-aligned 90px labels, #F5F5F5 tracks, values printed inside the fill, the page's subject always the red bar, optional red uppercase delta line). Draw layouts from the locked enumeration: cover / contents / big-number / data-theater (left hero column + 2–3 bench columns + hairline summary strip) / dark divider / two-column before-after / timeline / quote / stats-grid / dark closing — white pages dominate with at most 2–3 dark pages. No emoji, no gradients, no shadows, no border-radius, no second color, no second font. Build a single self-contained HTML file by copying example.html and replacing content only — keep its design tokens, chrome bars, grid hairlines, and navigation script (←/→/Space keys, #/N hash routing, click zones, counter pill) intact. Use the user's real numbers, never lorem ipsum or invented data; Chinese copy uses 「」 quotes; replace all fictional 析衡/XIHENG demo content.
query.zh-CN: 用「信息建筑·红」体系为 {{audience}} 做一套关于 {{topic}} 的 {{deckType}}（页数 {{slideCount}}）：1920×1080 固定画布、上下 64px 黑色信息条、5% 透明度瑞士网格细线、Helvetica Neue 单一字体栈零外部依赖、唯一红色 #E63946 每页最多 4 处、180–260px 巨型数字锚点、红/黑/灰三色对比条形图，版式从封面/目录/巨数/数据剧场/暗色分隔/前后对照/里程碑/引语/指标矩阵/暗色结尾枚举中取用。从 example.html 复制出单文件、只换内容，保留 token、信息条、网格线和导航脚本；用真实数据、替换全部「析衡」演示内容。完整规格以英文版为准（follow the en query above）。

inputs.name: topic
inputs.label: Topic
inputs.placeholder: 你的主题，例如：2026 年度增长数据复盘

inputs.name: audience
inputs.label: Audience
inputs.placeholder: 董事会 / 投资人 / 全员大会
